title: cyclosorus ponapeanus
intro: Cyclosorus ponapeanus, also known as the Ponape fern or Cyclosorus fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to the Pacific island of Ponape. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus ponapeanus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
